# deviceInquiryComplete(_:error:aborted:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ IOBluetooth ](/documentation/iobluetooth)

-  deviceInquiryComplete(_:error:aborted:) 

Instance Method# deviceInquiryComplete(_:error:aborted:)

macOS

```
optional func deviceInquiryComplete(
    _ sender: IOBluetoothDeviceInquiry!,
    error: IOReturn,
    aborted: Bool
)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/IOBluetooth/IOBluetoothDeviceInquiryDelegate/deviceInquiryComplete(_:error:aborted:)#parameters)

`sender`Inquiry object that sent this delegate message.

`error`Error code. kIOReturnSuccess if the inquiry completed without incident.

`aborted`TRUE if user called -stop on the inquiry.

## [Discussion](/documentation/IOBluetooth/IOBluetoothDeviceInquiryDelegate/deviceInquiryComplete(_:error:aborted:)#Discussion)

When the inquiry is completely stopped, this delegate method will be invoked. It will supply an error code value, kIOReturnSuccess if the inquiry stopped without problem, otherwise a non-kIOReturnSuccess error code will be supplied.
